items.title: Software Quality & Testing Specialization (self-directed)
bullets: Preparing for the ISTQB Foundation Level certification
Writing and executing manual test cases, tracking defects in Jira
Automating tests with Selenium, Playwright, Postman, and JUnit
Applying Agile methodologies (Scrum, Kanban) and software quality best practices

items.title: Full-time — Java Backend Engineer, Microservices
bullets: Developed Spring Boot microservices in a distributed environment
Optimized REST API performance and improved service resilience
Contributed to backend architecture and distributed systems design

items.title: Graduation Internship — Java Backend Engineer
bullets: Built an advanced search module for an ERP system with Spring Boot, REST APIs, and PostgreSQL
Implemented multi-criteria search filters for more relevant results
Set up CI/CD pipelines to automate the module's deployment

items.title: Internship — Backend Engineer, Architecture & Microservices
bullets: Migrated a SaaS application from a monolithic to a microservices architecture
Split the system into independent services exposing REST APIs (Spring Boot)
Set up a distributed architecture with Spring Cloud, RabbitMQ, and an API Gateway
Worked closely with frontend teams on feature integration

items.title: Internship — Backend Engineer, IoT & Event-Driven
bullets: Built a Java backend for real-time IoT data processing
Implemented an event-driven architecture with Apache Kafka
Designed REST APIs with Spring Boot and MongoDB persistence
Containerized services with Docker and covered them with unit tests (JUnit, Mockito)
